## Description
<!-- Describe your changes in detail -->

## Type of change
<!-- Mark with an [x] all that apply -->
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Generator/template change

## Checklist
<!-- Mark with an [x] all completed items -->
- [ ] Build passes (`dotnet build`)
- [ ] All tests pass (`dotnet test`)
- [ ] I have reviewed generated output (if generator changes)
- [ ] I have explained changes to `Generated/` folder (if applicable)
- [ ] `README.md` updated (if user-facing behaviour changed)
- [ ] `ARCHITECTURE.md` updated (if architectural patterns changed)
- [ ] Item template files in `Domains/.template/` are in sync with `Domains/Sample/` source
- [ ] Breaking changes are documented with migration notes (if applicable)
- [ ] New dependencies added to `CONTRIBUTING.md` prerequisites (if applicable)
- [ ] Item templates install without error (`dotnet new install`)

## Testing
<!-- Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes -->

## Related Issues
